segments.text: Then Eliphaz the Temanite answered and said:
Can a man be profitable to God, Though he who is wise may be profitable to himself?
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: Is it any pleasure to the Almighty that you are righteous? Or is it gain to Him that you make your ways blameless?
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: Is it because of your fear of Him that He corrects you, And enters into judgment with you?
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: Is not your wickedness great, And your iniquity without end?
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: For you have taken pledges from your brother for no reason, And stripped the naked of their clothing.
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: You have not given the weary water to drink, And you have withheld bread from the hungry.
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: But the mighty man possessed the land, And the honorable man dwelt in it.
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: You have sent widows away empty, And the strength of the fatherless was crushed.
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: Therefore snares are all around you, And sudden fear troubles you,
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: Or darkness so that you cannot see; And an abundance of water covers you.
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: Is not God in the height of heaven? And see the highest stars, how lofty they are!
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: And you say, 'What does God know? Can He judge through the deep darkness?
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: Thick clouds cover Him, so that He cannot see, And He walks above the circle of heaven.'
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: Will you keep to the old way Which wicked men have trod,
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: Who were cut down before their time, Whose foundations were swept away by a flood?
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: They said to God, 'Depart from us! What can the Almighty do to them?'
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: Yet He filled their houses with good things; But the counsel of the wicked is far from me.
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: The righteous see it and are glad, And the innocent laugh at them:
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: Surely our adversaries are cut down, And the fire consumes their remnant.
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: Now acquaint yourself with Him, and be at peace; Thereby good will come to you.
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: Receive, please, instruction from His mouth, And lay up His words in your heart.
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: If you return to the Almighty, you will be built up; You will remove iniquity far from your tents.
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: Then you will lay your gold in the dust, And the gold of Ophir among the stones of the brooks.
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: Yes, the Almighty will be your gold And your precious silver;
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: For then you will have your delight in the Almighty, And lift up your face to God.
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: You will make your prayer to Him, He will hear you, And you will pay your vows.
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: You will also declare a thing, And it will be established for you; So light will shine on your ways.
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: When they cast you down, and you say, 'Exaltation will come!' Then He will save the humble person.
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: He will even deliver one who is not innocent; Yes, he will be delivered by the purity of your hands.
segments.speaker: Eliphaz
